MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SOSA, M. JESUS L. AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, DAVID DBA DIBEDAEL HANDYMAN SERVICES CRUZ, ELENA A. DBA DIBIDAEL HANDYMAN SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
